dir.code: nam, ky, so_the_ts, tk_kh, tk_cp, ma_bp_ts, ma_kh, ma_vv, ma_bp, ma_hd, so_lsx

title.v: khai báo hệ số phân bổ khấu hao TSCĐ

command.text: select cast(case when exists(select 1 from &FixedAssetTable; where ma_dvcs = @@unit and so_the_ts = @so_the_ts) then 1 else 0 end as bit) as dv_yn return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin hệ số phân bổ đang cập nhật đã được khai báo, không lưu được.' else N'This item already exists, it can not be saved.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where ky = @ky and nam = @nam and so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and tk_kh = @tk_kh and tk_cp = @tk_cp and ma_bp_ts = @ma_bp_ts and ma_kh = @ma_kh and ma_vv = @ma_vv and ma_bp = @ma_bp and ma_hd = @ma_hd and so_lsx = @so_lsx) begin select '' as field, @$exists as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ky = @ky and nam = @nam and so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and tk_kh = @tk_kh and tk_cp = @tk_cp and ma_bp_ts = @ma_bp_ts and ma_kh = @ma_kh and ma_vv = @ma_vv and ma_bp = @ma_bp and ma_hd = @ma_hd and so_lsx = @so_lsx

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmts where so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and ma_dvcs = @@unit) begin select rtrim(a.tk_kh) as tk_kh, case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(b.ten_tk) else rtrim(b.ten_tk2) end as ten_tk_kh, rtrim(a.tk_cp) as tk_cp, case when @@language = 'v' then rtrim(c.ten_tk) else rtrim(c.ten_tk2) end as ten_tk_cp from dmts a left join dmtk b on a.tk_kh = b.tk and b.loai_tk ='1' left join dmtk c on a.tk_cp = c.tk and c.loai_tk ='1' where a.so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and a.ma_dvcs = @@unit return end
